title: LOUISIANA SCHOOL AND STUDENT SAFETY
doc_html:
PART XII. LOUISIANA SCHOOL AND STUDENT SAFETY

SUBPART A. THREATS OF VIOLENCE OR TERRORISM

§409.1. Short title

            This Subpart may be cited as the "Louisiana School and Student Safety Act".

            Acts 2018, No. 716, §1.
